Video.summary: A landlord sues his former tenants for unpaid rent and late fees; an unfinished floor remodeling job and reportedly unwanted sexual advances bring ex-friends to court.
Video.title: Remodeling Regrets

Video.summary: Two cousins find themselves embroiled in litigation over breach of contract; a couple sue their former roommate for unpaid rent, utility bills, late fees and lost wages.
Video.title: Family Ties, Broken Leases

Video.summary: A woman says her son-in-law stole money out of her deceased daughter's bank account; a plaintiff contends that as soon as he broke things off with the defendant, she stole his identity.
Video.title: Grave Robbing

Video.summary: First, man sues his ex-wife for gas bill. Then, plaintiffs are suing for unpaid wages and fuel costs.
Video.title: All Gas, No Breaks

Video.summary: A workplace romance takes a dramatic turn as Jarius seeks the truth about his paternity of 1-year-old Legacii.
Video.title: Childs vs. Macon

Video.summary: The ashes of a deceased pet have exes Tianie and Abner rehashing issues from their recent breakup.
Video.title: Harrell vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Sherri is suing her ex-husband for her son's unpaid medical bill and emotional distress.
Video.title: Teaching a Life Lesson

Video.summary: First, a woman claims she was not paid for her services. Then, plaintiff contends damage to his windshield.
Video.title: A Rock in Hard Place

Video.summary: First, a woman claims defendent sold her a broken car. Then, a plaintiff claims unpaid lones.
Video.title: M'lady of Maladies

Video.summary: A mother and son sue over damages to the son's car, while the defendant blames faulty tires; a man sues his ex-girlfriend for unpaid rent and a lease buyout fee.
Video.title: Wheel Deal or No Deal?

Video.summary: A woman sues her sister-in-law over funeral costs incurred for her late brother; a woman says she agreed to lend her co-worker some cash to help him during tough times, but he refused to pay her back, saying the money was a gift and not a loan.
Video.title: Funeral Feud

Video.summary: A messy breakup leads to a heated dispute over car damage, cheating accusations and a demand for compensation.
Video.title: Dooley vs. Sanders

Video.summary: The Stallworths bring their relational issues to the Cutlers in a last ditch effort to save their marriage.
Video.title: Stallworth vs Stallworth

Video.summary: Texas pair Joel and Erin go head to head in court to handle some unfinished business after their breakup.
Video.title: Whitaker vs. Estevez

Video.summary: Jerkmeeka issues Rodriquez an ultimatum after his longtime female friend begins interfering in their marriage.
Video.title: Tuggle-Wright vs. Tuggle

Video.summary: After four years of hookups, Deja is ready to determine her compatibility with Onika and decide if she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Lackely vs. Rivera

Video.summary: Lomecia confronts Tee over infidelity, family interference and broken trust, demanding a lie detector test to save her marriage.
Video.title: Eason vs. Eason

Video.summary: Damage to personal items, theft of a dog, and unpaid rent have exes fighting.
Video.title: Bey vs. Williams

Video.summary: Professional R&B artist Nathaniel disputes his girlfriend LeAnn's accusation of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Hall vs. Peterson

Video.summary: Erica is bringing Isaiah to court under allegations of stealing money intended for medical purposes to rent a party bus.
Video.title: Hendrickson vs. Bennett

Video.summary: Aspiring social media star Mike sues ex-girlfriend Sidney for nonpayment after she profited from an explicit adult video.
Video.title: Barham vs. Starr

Video.summary: Sarah Oliver ("Bad Girls Club") weighs in on balancing work and love in Will and Jaheim's dramatic relationship.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Duval

Video.summary: Tensions run high in the courtroom as Gayla and James decide if they should call off their wedding.
Video.title: Williams vs. Edwards

Video.summary: Secrets, suspicions and a paternity test collide as a strained couple battle for truth and trust in court.
Video.title: Moore vs. Ariza

Video.summary: Symoan and Hillary seek answers from the Cutlers' compatibility test in an effort to save their 10-year marriage.
Video.title: Willis vs. Greene

Video.summary: International twerk coach Christopher brings ex-boyfriend Carl to court after they fail at mixing business and pleasure.
Video.title: Lewis vs. Nuckols

Video.summary: Professional dominatrix Sasha brings her boyfriend, Perrance, to court in hope of spicing up their relationship.
Video.title: Bryer vs. Williams

Video.summary: Felicia is done playing sugar mama for her younger boyfriend, Tyler: she wants the money she's owed for his repossessed truck.
Video.title: Mallett vs. Silas

Video.summary: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.
Video.title: Truell vs. Truell

Video.summary: The results of a double polygraph determine the future of newlyweds Sierra and Victor's marriage.
Video.title: Buckner vs. Banks

Video.summary: Sade confronts her boyfriend, Jeremy, in court about his gambling addiction and bill money spent on lottery tickets.
Video.title: Black vs. Wiles

Video.summary: A Georgia man questions if his girlfriend’s late night “work calls” mean she’s escorting again. A polygraph test will reveal all.
Video.title: Ubani vs. Green

Video.summary: Will is bringing Jazmine to court in a last-ditch effort to save their relationship from the stresses of social media.
Video.title: Bouie vs. Jackson

Video.summary: A stolen car and four slashed tires have exes Tiffany and Jonathan arguing in court over who is at fault.
Video.title: Martin vs. Polite

Video.summary: After things go south while living together, exes Eric and Zaniya counter sue each other over money owed.
Video.title: Keeton vs. Barnett

Video.summary: A grieving grandmother demands a paternity test to uncover the truth about her late son's mysterious child.
Video.title: Moultry vs. Portuonio

Video.summary: Antoine Grice sues landlord Nicholas Renzi for $868, claiming the apartment was unlivable and his security deposit was unfairly withheld. Renzi counters that Antoine was a troublesome tenant who overstayed.
Video.title: Lousy Landlording

Video.summary: Russell King claims Rasheeda Brown owes him $3,000 for painting her house, despite doing an excellent job. Rasheeda argues he brought his son to work with heavy machinery, acted inappropriately, and left the job incomplete.
Video.title: Painting Disaster

Video.summary: Irma demands a refund for the party bus she rented from LaToya, stating it wasn't decorated properly.
Video.title: Unhappy Birthday Party

Video.summary: Jeretha is petitioning the court for a DNA test to be given to a woman she thinks is her sister.
Video.title: From Strangers to Sisters

Video.summary: Jorge brings his wife to court for damaged property after constantly accusing him of cheating.
Video.title: Done with the Accusations

Video.summary: Chanel is suing her ex for a gift and emotional distress after finding out he's been texting other women.
Video.title: What Happened in Vegas?

Video.summary: Jessica is suing her ex-boyfriend, stating he attacked her after accusing her of sleeping with his cousin.
Video.title: You're Just Toxic

Video.summary: Tajanea is suing her ex-boyfriend for over $2,000 after she claimed he damaged her car and apartment.
Video.title: Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship

Image.alt: Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship
Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship
Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship

Video.summary: Ebony is here to get help for her brother who's opioid addiction worsened after his wife overdosed.
Video.title: Hooked on Opioids

Video.summary: First, an alleged hit and run. Then, a plaintiff claims the defendant left house in shambles.
Video.title: In Shambles

Video.summary: First, plaintiff sues for parking ticket. Then, a litigant disputes a breach of contract over an investment.
Video.title: Unsullied and Unpaid

Video.summary: First, unpaid rent amongst best friends come to court. Then, the plaintiff claims he was struck by vehicle.
Video.title: Pain and Suffering

Video.summary: A woman says a company damaged her custom stone floors and wants her money back; plaintiffs say the defendant's reckless driving damaged their iron fence, but he says he was trying to avoid a deer.
Video.title: A Rocky Start

Video.summary: First, a man sues estranged friend for an unpaid loan. Then, couple is suing for an unfinished remodeling job.
Video.title: Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room

Image.alt: Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room
Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room
Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims ex-wife let him unpaid bills. Then, it’s a case of hit and run.
Video.title: Hit and Ruin

Video.summary: A promoter claims he booked space for an event only to find out that the venue wasn't available; two huskies attack a puppy, resulting in nearly $5,000 in medical expenses, while the dogs' owner insists they are not dangerous.
Video.title: Booked, Barked, and Billed

Video.summary: First, woman claims girl quit cheer team after begging to join. Then, a man claims girlfriend assaulted him.
Video.title: Cheer Leaver

Video.summary: First, Aunt sues niece for destroying car and failure to repay loan. Then, a dad sues his son for unpaid loan.
Video.title: Family Feuds

Video.summary: An unfinished construction job results in a heap of garbage, but the defendant says he did exactly what he was paid to do; a woman sues her sister for car repairs.
Video.title: Nailed It… or Failed It?
